overall.description: A first-person walk through a foggy cyberpunk city waterfront at night, featuring neon-lit skyscrapers, digital billboards, and a street food vendor. The footage is from a video game with high-fidelity cinematic graphics, showcasing a futuristic urban environment with persistent haze and vibrant artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic waterfront promenade with food vendor

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a foggy cyberpunk waterfront promenade past a food vendor

notable_agents.action: food vendor standing at illuminated grill cart, preparing to move away

entered.detail: futuristic food cart with glowing blue grill surface and skewered items
tall illuminated digital billboard displaying green and white graphics
dense group of futuristic high-rise buildings with illuminated windows and neon accents
metal safety railing running along the edge of the waterfront walkway
thick utility cables stretching horizontally across the scene between poles
multi-story building with external metal staircase and neon signage

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy cyberpunk waterfront promenade at night, with a food vendor working at an illuminated cart on the right. The camera walks forward past the vendor, with towering skyscrapers and a large digital billboard visible through the haze in the distance, while a building with exterior stairs looms on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic waterfront promenade approaching stairway building

events.description: food vendor exits frame, leaving the promenade empty

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk forward along the waterfront path toward a building with red neon signage

entered.detail: bright red neon signs and lighting on the building facade becoming prominent

segments.scene_description: After the vendor exits the frame, the camera continues walking along the empty foggy promenade, approaching the building with exterior stairs and vibrant red neon signage on the left. The skyscraper cluster and digital billboard remain visible in the background but shift position as the camera advances.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a foggy cyberpunk waterfront that shifts from a bustling vendor stall toward the imposing architecture of a neon-lit district. It begins by passing an illuminated food cart on the right, with the camera gliding forward as towering skyscrapers and a massive digital billboard loom through the dense nighttime haze. As the vendor exits the frame, the perspective advances further along the empty promenade, causing the distant skyline to shift and realign in the background. The scene then draws closer to a building on the left, where the atmospheric fog reveals the sharp lines of exterior stairs and the glow of vibrant red neon signage.
